config.html:
Scaffold từ DQHF — form gốc: frmBaoCaoFinalAdd3, frmBaoCaoFinalAdd
Nút WinForms gốc: Cập nhật báo cáo · Thêm · Thêm · Lưu báo cáo
Nút cần gắn thêm: Xoá (procedure/records.delete) · In (cần print template entity) · Xuất (export)
Proc cần port: TR_BAOCAO_FINAL_GETBYID, TR_BAOCAO_FINAL_HINHANH_DELETE, TR_BAOCAO_FINAL_HINHANH_GETALL, TR_BAOCAO_FINAL_HINHANH_INSERT, TR_BAOCAO_FINAL_MUCKIEMTRA_DELETE, TR_BAOCAO_FINAL_MUCKIEMTRA_DELETE2, TR_BAOCAO_FINAL_MUCKIEMTRA_GETALL, TR_BAOCAO_FINAL_MUCKIEMTRA_GETBYID, TR_BAOCAO_FINAL_MUCKIEMTRA_INSERT, TR_BAOCAO_FINAL_MUCKIEMTRA_UPDATE, TR_BAOCAO_FINAL_UPDATE, TR_ORDER_DETAIL_GETBYMULTIPLEORDER, TR_BAOCAO_FINAL_HINHANH_GETBYID, TR_BAOCAO_FINAL_HINHANH_UPDATE, TR_BAOCAO_FINAL_INSERT, TR_BAOCAO_FINAL_MUCKIEMTRA_GETALL2, TR_ORDER_DETAIL_GETALL, TR_ORDER_DETAIL_GETLISTBYORDER, TR_ORDER_GET2
Entity phụ (lookup/filter cân nhắc thêm): tr_baocao_final, tr_baocao_final_hinhanh, tr_color, tr_hehang, tr_khachhang, tr_loaisp, tr_material, tr_order, tr_order_detail, tr_reftype
